examples.text: The infrastructure connecting these vulnerable farms could quickly spread disease: pathogens could hitch a ride from one farm to another on workers’ boots, railroad cars, and steamships.
examples.explanation: 这里 hitch a ride 表示“搭便车、借助……传播”。句中指病原体附着在工人的靴子、火车车厢和轮船等媒介上，从一个农场传播到另一个农场。

source.text: The dark history of bananas - John Soluri
